name: SecurityLocalAllowNetworkWideRegistrations
title: SecurityLocalAllowNetworkWideRegistrations
description: Allows to register and unregister to network related security data. It is a precondition for using SecurityLocalRegisterApplicationProtocol and SecurityLocalUnregisterApplicationProtocol.

For use with a simulation node, the function has to be called in the on prestart event of the simulation node which is not defined in the database. The function can’t be executed after measurement has started. The function can’t be executed by database nodes.
For use with a test module, the function can be called at any time.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
